heroEyebrow: Holy Motherhood Mentorship • Womb Therapy • Ritual Bodywork
heroHeading: Come Home to Your Body and Embody Your Soul
aboutHeading: Listening Is a State of Being
aboutBodies:
Mama, you spend so much of your days (and nights) tending to those around you with the utmost care.


It is time to devote yourself to YOU.


My personal initiation into motherhood has guided me through a journey of soul retrieval, ancestral healing and cycle breaking. 


By walking through the fire, I have discovered beautiful gifts. 


It is an honor to offer an empathic space where you are finally held, wrapped in a cocoon of safety, and invited to unwind.
My work allows for the unraveling of untruths, so that you may remember the power of embodying and leading from your innate wisdom.

Motherhood is perhaps the most powerful initiation of our lifetime. It asks everything of us, and offers everything in return.


The chaos, the divine play, the innocence and curiosity, the deepest devotion to love ~

There is an invitation to return to wholeness through the initiation of motherhood. 

Recovered fragmented parts that were forgotten along the way.

When we choose to honor this path as Holy, we are able to access the gifts that come with this divinely ordained responsibility.

I offer womb therapy for all seasons of divine femininity, ritual bodywork as a prayer to the body as a temple for God, and deeply attuned coaching experiences for mamas who know that they are here to savor a life of joyful pleasures, magnetic radiance, and radical self trust.

Within this space, time softens. The nervous system unwinds, the mind quiets, and something deeper begins to awaken. 

These sessions bring nourishment on a cellular and soul level. It is an honor to carry this medicine.

May you be held, nourished and restored daily.

In Joy,
Capri
